violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): One ceiling tile in front service area noted wet-stained needs replacing. (also-repair any water leaks above this tile) Ceiling light covers and vent covers in prep area noted in need of cleaning.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): A covered waste receptacle was not provided in the women's toilet room.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. (lid is up)
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Fan noted in need of cleaning
POISONS/TOXIC MATERIALS AND MEDICINE (3 pts): Chemical spray bottle of chlorine (full strength) noted not labeled poured out.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided. ( Chlorine = 50 to 100 ppm )
